name: Nippon Kinzoku Co., Ltd.
summary: Nippon Kinzoku Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells stainless steel precision rolling/processing products in Japan and internationally. The company offers steel foils, such as cold-rolled stainless and special steel strips; processed products, including precision profile rolled steel products, precision pipes, and stainless steel sections/roll forming products; grain and non-grain oriented electrical steel foils, wound iron cores/reactors, etc.; and magnesium alloy foils, as well as foil silicon steel products. Nippon Kinzoku Co., Ltd. was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
